name: Cursed Encyclopedia of Monster Girls [MGE - AnyPOV; TF]
description:
Monster girls... a dream seemed impossible to grasp about.

But... what if you found something that, certainly, could help you achieve that dream?

Or better... what if YOU were under the skin of the monster girls themselves by just having a magical book under your hands?!

Sounds... incredible!

This is a bot suggestion from someone in , made as an "alternative" to the Chaquetrix and TF Watch bots.
creator: Riley_the_TF_Creator
